message:
fix(cli): apply recipe filtering before robot modes (bv-93)

The root cause was that recipe filtering happened at line 4616-4618,
AFTER all robot mode exit points (around line 2780). When running
`bv --recipe actionable --robot-next`, the recipe filter was never applied.

The fix applies recipe filtering early for robot modes, after label scoping
but before robot modes start. dataHash computation uses pre-filtered issues
for stability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
